title: Palmerston North、MWT — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Palmerston North、MWTの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Palmerston NorthはMWTにある人口90,000の都市です。A university city in the Manawatū region, known for its vibrant student population, beautiful parks, and strong agricultural sector.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
